_comment: Local model/asset registry for TrustShield. Binaries live under models/ (gitignored); ONLY this file and REGISTRY.md are committed. Code resolves assets via services/forensics/app/ingest/model_registry.py (env TRUSTSHIELD_MODEL_DIR, default repo models/). Every consumer MUST fall back to a heuristic when status != 'present' — no runtime network fetches, ever.

assets.name: layoutlmv3-base
assets.use: doc-type classifier + key-value extractor (Person-2 fine-tune target)
assets.fallback: heuristic keyword doc-type classifier (ingest/classify.py) + regex extractors (extractor.py)

assets.name: doctamper-code
assets.use: image-forgery detector (DTD/Swin) source + per-image JPEG quant tables (pks/*.pk). NOTE: the pks/ files are quantization dicts, NOT trained weights.
assets.fallback: heuristic image forensics (image_forensics.py): noise-loss + ELA + flat-fill + copy-move

assets.name: doctamper-weights
assets.use: trained DTD checkpoint (.pth) for learned tamper-text localization — catches digital edits with no noise/JPEG trace
assets.source_url: gated — request from the DocTamper authors (education email), like the dataset
assets.fallback: heuristic image forensics; the seam in ingest/doctamper.py enables this automatically once a checkpoint is placed here (+ torch installed)

assets.name: doctamper-data
assets.use: training data for the forgery CNN (DocTamperV1 Train/Test/SCD/FCD) — we TRAIN our own DTD weights on this (Phase 5), filling the gated-checkpoint gap
assets.fallback: not used at runtime — training only

assets.name: forgery-trufor
assets.use: TruFor forgery-localization model (public weights + reliability map). Pretrained drop-in for ingest/forgery_model.py backend 'trufor'.
assets.fallback: heuristic image forensics; run `python scripts/setup_forgery_model.py trufor` to enable (+ torch)

assets.name: forgery-catnet
assets.use: CAT-Net forgery-localization model (JPEG-compression-aware — good for ID-card JPEGs). Backend 'catnet'.
assets.fallback: heuristic image forensics; run `python scripts/setup_forgery_model.py catnet` to enable (+ torch)

assets.name: paddleocr-src
assets.use: optional OCR upgrade over Tesseract (PP-OCRv4 + PP-Structure)
assets.fallback: Tesseract (bundled in both Docker images) via forensics ocr.py

assets.name: paddleocr-weights
assets.use: PP-OCRv4 det+rec weights — must be pre-cached at dev time (NEVER auto-fetched at runtime)

not_required.name: torchvision-backbone
not_required.reason: DocTamper ships its own Swin backbone + pretrained checkpoints; a separate torchvision EfficientNet/ResNet is unnecessary. If ever needed it is a dev-time torchvision.models(weights=...) fetch on the GPU machine, not at runtime.

not_required.name: rvl-cdip
not_required.reason: ~37GB; doc-type classifier trains on generator-v2 instead.
